_metadata.notes: All values sourced directly from the Operators Manual. Do not modify without updating om_reference.

limits.label: Idle RPM minimum
limits.note: Engine must idle at or above 1,800 rpm. Short dips are normal governor variation.

limits.label: Max continuous RPM
limits.note: 5,500 rpm is max continuous; 5,800 rpm allowed for 5 min

limits.label: Oil pressure min (>3500 rpm)
limits.note: Minimum 2.0 bar / 29 psi above 3,500 rpm. Phase-filtered — pre-flight and engine start readings excluded.

limits.label: Oil pressure max (cold start)
limits.note: Up to 7.0 bar / 101.5 psi acceptable during cold start warmup

limits.label: Oil temp minimum (takeoff)
limits.note: Must reach 50°C / 122°F before takeoff. Phase-filtered — pre-flight readings excluded.

limits.label: Oil temp optimal band (low)
limits.note: Below 90°C / 194°F risks condensation in sump — reach 100°C once daily. Reported in oil temp analysis section, not exceedances.

limits.label: Coolant temp maximum
limits.note: Maximum 120°C / 248°F at normal operation up to critical altitude

limits.label: Fuel pressure minimum
limits.note: 2.9 bar / 42 psi minimum at fuel rail relative to MAP

limits.label: Fuel pressure maximum
limits.note: 3.2 bar / 46 psi nominal max. Transient exceedances suppressed during taxi/pump test and tank switching in cruise. 51 psi allowed for 3 sec after power change per OM.

limits.label: Bus voltage minimum
limits.note: Below ~12V indicates alternator failure or excessive load

egt_spread.note: EGT split limits are conditional on fuel flow — two separate thresholds per OM Chapter 2.1
egt_spread.high_flow_note: EGT split limit at fuel flow > 3 L/hr (200°C / 392°F)
egt_spread.low_flow_note: EGT split limit at fuel flow < 3 L/hr (500°C / 932°F)

overboost.note: 5-minute (300s) limit on operation at or above 5,800 rpm / 100% power

eco_power_mode.note: Below ~97% throttle position the ECU operates in ECO mode. Not directly available in G3X log columns — must be inferred.

phase_detection.note: Values derived from operating limits above — not separately sourced
